chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. NO.D-1763 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7974 of 2024 2. For hearing of main case ---------------------------------------------- 09.10.2025 None present for the petitioner ------------------------ This petition was last fixed on 07.08.2024, when none was present for the petitioner, without any intimation. In the last more than one year, learned counsel for petitioner has not pursued this petition diligently. Today again, despite lapse of more than one year, no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioner, without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is hereby dismissed for non-prosecution along with all pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
